keyValues.article.characteristic.value.must.not.be: Article characteristic value must not be empty.
keyValues.article.characteristic.value.min.length: Article characteristic value must be at least 3 characters long.
keyValues.article.characteristic.value.max.length: Article characteristic value must not exceed 128 characters.
keyValues.article.characteristic.name.max.length: Article characteristic name must not exceed 128 characters.
keyValues.article.content.self.reference.not.allow: Article cannot reference itself as content.
keyValues.article.content.count.must.be.non.negati: Quantity must be greater than or equal to 0.
keyValues.article.image.invalid.extension: File must be a valid image.
keyValues.article.images.must.not.be.empty: Image list must not be empty.
keyValues.article.pair.self.reference.not.allowed: Article cannot be paired with itself.
keyValues.article.reservation.max.count.exceeded: Maximum 100 reservations can be added at once.
Proposed price must be greater than 0 or not set.
keyValues.article.reservation.initial.count.must.b: Initial quantity must be greater than 0.
keyValues.article.reservation.current.count.must.b: Current quantity must be greater than 0.
keyValues.article.reservation.initial.count.not.le: Initial quantity cannot be less than current quantity.
keyValues.article.reservation.buyer.id.must.not.be: Buyer ID must not be empty.
keyValues.article.reservation.storage.name.must.no: Storage name must not be empty.
keyValues.article.reservation.needed.count.must.be: Requested quantity must be greater than 0.
keyValues.article.create.articles.must.have.at.lea: At least one article must be provided.
keyValues.article.create.articles.max.100.at.once: Maximum 100 articles can be created at once.
keyValues.article.articleNumber.must.not.be.empty: Article number must not be empty.
keyValues.article.articleNumber.min.length.3: Article number must be at least 3 characters long.
keyValues.article.articleNumber.max.length.128: Article number must not exceed 128 characters.
keyValues.article.name.must.not.be.empty: Article name must not be empty.
keyValues.article.name.min.length.3: Article name must be at least 3 characters long.
keyValues.article.name.max.length.255: Article name must not exceed 255 characters.
keyValues.article.description.max.length.255: Article description must not exceed 255 characters.
keyValues.article.indicator.max.length.24: Article indicator must not exceed 24 characters.
keyValues.article.linkage.article.cannot.equal.cro: Article cannot be the same as cross article.
keyValues.article.size.height.max.two.decimals: Height can have at most 2 decimal places.
keyValues.article.size.width.max.two.decimals: Width can have at most 2 decimal places.
keyValues.article.size.length.max.two.decimals: Length can have at most 2 decimal places.
keyValues.article.weight.max.two.decimals: Weight can have at most 2 decimal places.
keyValues.article.reservation.search.term.min.leng: Search term must be at least 3 characters long.
keyValues.article.reservation.similarity.range: Similarity level must be between 0 and 1.
